name: morph
title: morph
description: Cross-fade plus a subtle synchronized scale (outgoing 1 → 1.04, incoming 0.96 → 1). Small enough to register as polish, not effect. The defining 'premium feel' transition in the Onda catalog. Onda-original.
pickWhen: the cut should feel premium without announcing itself — Apple-keynote register, polished product film. The next step up from `cross-fade`.
